- A gateway for the next billion crypto users

Founded in 2018, BingX is a leading cryptocurrency exchange, serving over 20 million users worldwide. BingX offers diversified products and services, including spot, derivatives, copy trading, and asset management – all designed for the evolving needs of users, from beginners to professionals.

BingX is committed to providing a trustworthy platform that empowers users with innovative tools and features to elevate their trading proficiency.

## Responsibilities

- Individuals with a strong desire and passion to excel in Business Development
- Aspiring professionals who are currently active crypto traders or possess significant potential in blockchain technology
- Candidates who are open to a learning phase with a modest salary package for the first three months, with prospects of salary revision based on KPI achievements in the later stages
- Proficiency in English is essential

## Requirements

- Formulate business development plans, and assist the team in completing the introduction, negotiation, cooperation, and signing of business cooperation projects
- Contact, negotiate, and close profitable deals with potential KOL
- Support KOL and design special campaigns to increase KOL trading volume
- Build partnerships with key opinion leaders or crypto projects, promote cooperation with each other
- Conduct research to identify new markets and customer needs
- Build long-term relationships with new and existing KOL/clients

## Nice to Haves

- Join an international and diversified team
- Great career development in a fast-growing company
- Be part of the future of finance technology and achieve meaningful goals
- Competitive market salary and fully remote/work-from-home flexibility
- Flexibility to observe your local holiday calendar, alongside additional benefits

- Full-time

Discuss in detail during the interview

## 公司/团队介绍

- 是否远程：前期远程，后期需线下现场协作
- 时区要求：GMT+8
  
## 岗位要求、职责
**Frontend Engineer** 

Position Overview:
We are looking for a skilled and dedicated Frontend Engineer to join our team. This role focuses on developing, testing, and maintaining web applications using React. The ideal candidate will be proficient in frontend technologies, have a keen eye for detail, and be able to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams to deliver top-notch DeFi products.

Key Responsibilities:
Develop and maintain high-quality web applications using React.
Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to ensure seamless integration of frontend components.
Continuously improve and optimize frontend performance and user experience.
Perform all testing before release. Write and maintain unit tests and integration tests to ensure code stability and reliability.

Requirements:
3+ years of experience in frontend development with a strong focus on React.
Proficient in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, with a solid understanding of modern frontend build tools and frameworks.
Knowledgeable in crypto, DeFi.
Extensive experience in writing and maintaining unit tests and integration tests.
Strong problem-solving skills and logical thinking, with the ability to quickly identify and resolve issues.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

---------------------
**Backend Engineer**

Position Overview:
We are seeking an experienced Backend Engineer who will be responsible for designing and developing the server-side logic and architecture for our DeFi applications. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in building scalable systems, blockchain integrations, and secure APIs.

Key Responsibilities:
Design and develop highly scalable backend services for DeFi platforms, ensuring performance, security, and scalability.
Collaborate with frontend and smart contract engineers to integrate backend services with blockchain technology.
Optimize the backend architecture for efficient data storage, retrieval, and processing in a high-performance DeFi environment.
Implement secure APIs for communication between the frontend, smart contracts, and third-party services.
Participate in backend code reviews and troubleshoot any performance or security issues.
Stay updated on the latest backend development trends and best practices in DeFi and blockchain.

Requirements:
3+ years experience in backend development, with a focus on Java.
Experience of backend development with Node.js, Go, or equivalent technologies.
Strong understanding of blockchain architecture, smart contracts, and DeFi protocols.
Experience with database technologies (SQL, NoSQL) and data management in distributed systems.
Proven experience in building and maintaining APIs, microservices, and backend infrastructure.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

---------------------
**Smart Contract Engineer**

Position Overview:
We are seeking an experienced Smart Contract Engineer with a deep understanding of blockchain technology and smart contract development. The ideal candidate will possess extensive experience in smart contract coding, with proficiency in Solidity and Move being highly advantageous. You will play a pivotal role in developing secure and efficient smart contracts to enhance our DeFi offerings and ensure the integrity of our platform.

Key Responsibilities:
Design, develop, and test smart contracts for various DeFi applications, ensuring they are efficient, secure, and optimized for high performance.
Collaborate with the development team to integrate smart contracts with existing blockchain infrastructure and front-end applications.
Conduct thorough testing and audits of smart contracts to identify and rectify potential security vulnerabilities.
Participate in code reviews and provide technical guidance to enhance the quality and security of our codebase.
Stay updated with the latest in blockchain technology, smart contract security practices, and DeFi trends to incorporate cutting-edge solutions into our platform.


Requirements:
Strong experience in smart contract development, with prior knowledge of Solidity and Move being a plus.
A robust understanding of crypto, Web3 technologies, DeFi platforms, and smart contract security principles.
Proficient in English with excellent communication skills to effectively articulate technical concepts and collaborate with global teams.
Demonstrated coding skills with a focus on writing clean, efficient, and secure code.
A proactive problem-solver with a keen attention to detail and a passion for innovation in the blockchain and DeFi space.


## 工作环境
国内暂无办公室，后面会有。

jobs.raw_body:
## About Term Structure Labs
Term Structure Labs is pioneering the future of decentralized finance with cutting-edge products. Our new product, TermMax, is a rapidly growing fixed-rate lending and borrowing protocol currently topping the 1-month growth rankings on DefiLlama. Our team brings together exceptional engineers, successful hackathon participants, and experts in finance and trading, creating an ideal environment to build world-class products and grow professionally.

## About the Role
We are seeking a talented and motivated Frontend Engineer to join our team and help build cutting-edge decentralized finance (DeFi) applications. In this role, you will develop and maintain DeFi product interfaces with marketing features, ensuring optimal performance and seamless user experiences in the Web3 ecosystem.

## Key Responsibilities
- Develop and maintain DeFi product interfaces and marketing websites using modern frontend technologies
- Debug existing applications and implement performance optimizations to ensure fast, responsive user experiences
- Implement wallet connection features and EVM-compatible on-chain transaction capabilities
- Collaborate closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver cohesive user experiences
- Apply best practices for web security, especially in the context of blockchain applications
- Monitor site performance and make necessary adjustments for optimization

## Requirements
- Strong experience with Next.js, React.js, TypeScript, and state management solutions
- Proficiency in working with databases including MongoDB and PostgreSQL
- Experience with containerization technologies like Docker
- Demonstrated ability to leverage AI tools to accelerate development processes (testing, coding, documentation, wireframing)
- Open-minded approach to utilizing AI for code generation and collaborating effectively with team members on AI-generated code
- Eagerness to learn new technologies and adapt to different workflows for improved productivity
- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment with changing priorities
- Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
- Market-centered mindset with focus on solving problems and improving products quickly and efficiently
- Strong ownership spirit and ability to take initiative on projects

## Bonus Qualifications
- Previous experience with Web3 technologies, DeFi protocols, or blockchain applications
- Familiarity with smart contract integration and blockchain development patterns
- Experience with Web3 libraries (ethers.js, web3.js)
- Understanding of DeFi concepts (liquidity pools, yield farming, staking, etc.)
- Participation in blockchain/Web3 hackathons, with demonstrated ability to rapidly prototype and deliver innovative solutions

## Salary
24000-70000 USD/year

## Job Nature
- Full-time
- In-office with partial remote

## Work Location
Taipei

## Contact
Email: hr@ts.finance

Website:
https://ts.finance/

jobs.summary: ### 远程CEX-产品经理 (合约交易)
jobs.raw_body:
### 远程CEX-产品经理 (合约交易)

**职位概述：**

我们正在寻找一位具备合约产品经验的产品经理，加入核心业务团队，负责中心化交易平台的金融衍生品模块（包括但不限于合约、杠杆、统一账户等）的规划、设计与迭代落地。该职位将深度参与产品功能规划、跨团队协作及数据驱动优化，推动交易业务持续增长。

**岗位优势：**

✅ 交易所核心产品，推动业务增长 —— 负责合约、资产、风控、清算等核心交易模块设计与落地。
✅ 数据驱动，聚焦真实增长 —— 聚焦交易转化、留存、交易效率等关键指标，围绕用户旅程闭环持续优化。
✅ 用户体验为核心 —— 着重提升交易效率与产品可用性，从细节体验优化提升用户满意度。
✅ 行业领先经验支持 —— 团队成员来自头部交易所、量化团队、投资机构，深耕衍生品赛道。
✅ 灵活协作机制 —— 产品与技术、运营、增长团队高度协同，快速落地业务需求。

**公司简介：**

- 团队背景：成员来自全球前五大交易所、BAT核心团队、量化交易与风险投资等领域。
- 高效创收：小而精的产研团队，产品上线3个月即实现收支平衡，当前团队规模50人。

**岗位职责：**

- 负责中心化交易平台合约产品的规划、需求设计与持续迭代，包括交易功能、撮合逻辑、风控机制、账户系统等。
- 参与交易产品的中长期策略制定，结合市场调研、用户反馈、行业趋势制定产品Roadmap。
- 设计并拆解完整用户旅程，优化交易路径、降低操作复杂度、提升下单效率与成交转化率。
- 组织撰写PRD、交互文档、用研报告等，配合设计与研发推动产品实现。
- 深度参与数据分析，监控产品核心指标（如交易转化率、PNL留存、订单行为等），挖掘优化空间。
- 协调与推动CS、运营、技术、增长等团队高效协作，达成产品上线、版本迭代及运营目标。
- 研究竞品产品与行业趋势，提出差异化优化方案与功能拓展建议（如TPSL、CopyTrade、模拟交易、统一保证金等）。

**任职要求：**

- 本科及以上学历，5年以上产品工作经验，其中至少2年中心化交易所合约产品经验。
- 熟悉衍生品交易流程，对交易撮合、风控、清算、保证金模型有较深入理解。
- 具备较强的数据分析与产品策略能力，能用数据驱动产品迭代。
- 有良好的跨部门沟通与推动能力，能高效协同研发、测试、设计等团队推进项目。
- 对用户体验有敏感度，具备系统性思维与强执行能力，兼顾产品设计与落地节奏。
- 热爱Crypto行业，有行业热情和持续关注，理解Web3生态者优先。
- 英语书面能力良好，能阅读英文文档，与海外团队沟通者优先。

**加分项**

- 有交易所核心系统从 0 到 1，从 1 到 100 的产品搭建经验者优先；
- 熟悉合约产品指标体系（PnL、杠杆比率、订单行为、收益率分析等）；
- 有Copy Trade、统一保证金、子母账户、账户分层等系统设计经验；
- 熟悉DeFi、链上数据分析者或拥有链上钱包使用经验者优先。

**工作模式与薪酬：**

- 提供具备竞争力的薪资，月薪上限可达 USD 8,000，具体面议；
- 适应敏捷开发环境，可接受创业团队的 6 天工作制和远程工作模式（团队时间：北京时间）

**我们提供：**

💰 行业内具竞争力的薪资与成长路径
🚀 深度参与交易系统设计，推动核心业务成长
⚡ 快速迭代、高度协作的产研环境
🔥 接触Web3交易所一线实战，提升产品判断力与业务视野

**联系方式：**

- WeChat：PicoAng
- Telegram：@PicoAng

公司成立于19年Crypto交易所，为全球提供现货、合约、期权等衍生品等交易产品；Office分布新加坡、加拿大、欧美等。

## 岗位要求、职责
Position 一: Quant traders、DeFi trader、Quant engineer / developper
Job Type ：Full-Time, Remote
Industry ：Web3/Primary Fund
REQUIREMENTS: 
（1）Traders:
- Just based on strategies they built
（2）Quant engineer / developper:
- Programmer requirements (not just server-savvy, full-stack programmers are needed, preferably quantitative engineers):
1. Python SQL database
2. Need to connect to Binance read-only API to make grafana visualization panel
3. Need real-time websocket for obtaining data and placing orders
4. Need to add risk control to the server
（3）All jobs:
language: at least one of the following: French, English or Chinese.

Position 二：DevRel Engineer（开发者关系工程师）
Job Type：Full-Time, Remote
Industry: Web3/DEX/L2/ZK
PS
1、Strong background in software engineering with experience building developer tools or blockchain applications.
2、Proven track record of creating high-quality technical content (e.g., blog posts, tutorials, and documentation).
3、Experience organizing and conducting developer-focused events, workshops, or training sessions.
4、Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
5、Strong networking and relationship-building skills, with experience collaborating effectively with developers, community members, and ecosystem partners.
6、Ability to work within American time zones and business trips to the US.
Nice to Have:
- Solid understanding of zero-knowledge proofs and their applications.
- Experience with Rust or other compiled languages.

Position三：Golang工程师
Job Type：Full-Time, Remote 
Industry: Web3/Exchange
PS：
1、211本科及以上计算机专业，3/10年工作经验，
2、熟练掌握Golang高并发编程，并理解其原理。
3、丰富的GoZero、Gin和其他Golang框架经验。
4、熟练掌握中间件技术，包括MySQL、Redis和Kafka，以及它们的基本原理。
5、开发和维护分布式微服务架构的能力。

Position 四：测试工程师
Job Type：Full-Time, Remote 
Industry:  Web3
PS：
1、重点本科/211及以上，1-5年软件测试开发工作经验即可，
2、自学能力强，精通测试程序和测试用例设计方法，并能主动进行进一步的技术研究，
3、具有自动化测试框架（如Selenium、Appium、Pytest）方面的经验，
4、具备 API 测试方面的工作知识。对 HTTP、WebSocket、JSON 有深刻理解和丰富经验，
5、web3行业经验加分。

Position 五: Flutter app
Job Type: Full-Time, Remote 
Industry: Web3
PS: 
1. 计算机相关专业本科及以上学历，3-7年工作经验，
2、熟悉Dart，对Flutter组件化有一定的理解和实践，
3、负责公司Web3/金融产品的移动端 Flutter 开发，能够独立分析、根据需求进行设计，并完成相应的代码编写。
4、有Socket处理、K-line或ioslate经验者优先。
5、有股票、Web3/金融产品相关经验者优先。

Position 六: 前端工程师（Nodejs方向）
Job Type: Full-Time,  Remote 
Industry: Web3
PS: 
1、计算机、软件工程等相关专业本科及以上学历；
2、深入理解至少一种主流前端框架（React/Vue/Angular）；
3、5年以上前端开发经验，3年以上Node.js中大型项目实战经验，精通Node.js生态（Express/Koa/NestJS），熟悉高并发、性能调优、内存泄漏排查。

## 公司/团队介绍
公司成立于21年，总部位于新加坡，中国/美国/英国皆有office，是一家的Fintech公司，专门为数字资产市场提供智能交易基础设施。其中包括自动交易解决方案、期权和衍生品管理、算法执行和机构级 API 服务，帮助专业交易员、对冲基金和金融机构高效执行和优化交易策略。国内外团队合作，非常扁平团队风格，业务和职业的发展提空间较大。

jobs.title: [remote] openmind Company is looking for AI/ML Engineer – Autonomous Agent Design for Robotics
jobs.summary:
## About
We are looking for a visionary and technically skilled AI Engineer to take the lead in designing and deploying autonomous AI agents for real-world robotics applications. You will play a pivotal role in developing intelligent agents that can perceive, reason, and act in dynamic physical environments, coordinating across sensors, actuators, and high-level decision-making systems.
jobs.raw_body:
## About
We are looking for a visionary and technically skilled AI Engineer to take the lead in designing and deploying autonomous AI agents for real-world robotics applications. You will play a pivotal role in developing intelligent agents that can perceive, reason, and act in dynamic physical environments, coordinating across sensors, actuators, and high-level decision-making systems.

This role combines cutting-edge LLM-powered reasoning, real-time perception integration, and robotics system orchestration to build agents that operate with minimal human intervention in complex settings.

## Responsibilities
- Design and implement modular AI agent architectures for robotics systems, integrating vision, navigation, task planning, and memory.
- Lead development of agents that interact with robotics middleware and hardware systems in real-world environments.
- Integrate large language models (LLMs) for reasoning, decision-making, and tool usage in robotic workflows.
- Build multi-agent systems with clear routing logic, role assignment, and stateful memory management.
- Oversee deployment pipelines including containerization, orchestration (Docker), and system monitoring.
- Collaborate with robotics engineers, ML researchers, and product teams to ensure tight coupling between hardware capabilities and agent intelligence.
- Stay current with the latest advancements in AI agents, robotics, and embodied learning systems.

## Requirements
- 2+ years of experience in machine learning, robotics, or intelligent systems
- Strong proficiency in Python and experience working with LLM orchestration frameworks (e.g., LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Agno).
- Deep understanding of agent-based reasoning, memory, task decomposition, and tool integration.
- Experience deploying real-time AI applications with containerized infrastructure (e.g., Flask, Docker).
- Strong communication skills and experience leading cross-functional technical projects.

## Nice to Haves

jobs.title: [remote] Openmind is looking for Blockchain engineer - Smart Contract & Protocol Implementation (Fabric)
jobs.summary:
## About
We're looking for a practical and capable Blockchain Engineer to join our team and help build Fabric, a decentralized application designed for robotics communication. You'll be responsible for implementing smart contracts and core blockchain components such as slashing, rewards, and staking mechanisms.
jobs.raw_body:
## About
We're looking for a practical and capable Blockchain Engineer to join our team and help build Fabric, a decentralized application designed for robotics communication. You'll be responsible for implementing smart contracts and core blockchain components such as slashing, rewards, and staking mechanisms.

This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy building real-world systems, understand blockchain incentives, and want to see their code running in production. You'll be working in a small, focused team laying the foundation for a decentralized internet application.

## Responsibilities
- Design and implement smart contracts in Solidity for staking, slashing, and reward distribution.
- Deploy and maintain EVM-compatible smart contracts, ensuring they are efficient, testable, and secure.
- Write backend logic in Golang that interacts with the blockchain to manage on-chain state and off-chain reporting.
- Develop core blockchain components in Fabric, working closely with other engineering teams.

## Requirements
- Strong experience with Solidity and deploying EVM smart contracts.
- Proficiency in Golang and developing production-grade backend services.
- Familiarity with decentralized networks and mechanisms such as staking, rewards, and slashing.
- Ability to work independently on open-ended problems and collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
- Strong attention to security best practices and contract reliability.

## Nice to Haves

## Job Nature

- Remote or not: Remote or Bay Area

jobs.summary: 职位名称：加密货币 交易所测试工程师（远程办公）
jobs.raw_body:
职位名称：加密货币 交易所测试工程师（远程办公）

职位概述：
我们正在寻找一名测试工程师，加入交易平台的核心测试团队。该职位将全面负责功能测试、性能验证与自动化建设，保障交易系统在高并发、高复杂度场景下的稳定性和可靠性。

岗位优势：
✅ 核心系统，直面交易所最关键模块 —— 覆盖撮合、资产、杠杆、KYC等系统测试，确保核心交易链路稳定运行。
✅ 自动化与工程化升级 —— 参与接口测试、回归测试自动化，提升交付效率与产品质量。
✅ 全链路性能测试实践 —— 深度参与高并发压测、系统瓶颈定位与优化。
✅ 敏捷团队，高效作战 —— 跨产品、开发、运维密切协作，快速推动版本上线。
✅ 行业成长，拓展技术视野 —— 有机会接触Web3交互、区块链节点同步、钱包交互等前沿领域。

公司简介：
团队背景：成员来自全球前五大交易所核心团队、BAT互联网技术高管、量化交易、风险投资等领域。
高效创收：小而精的产研团队，上线3个月达到收支平衡，当前团队约 55 人。

岗位职责：
* 负责交易所核心系统（撮合、资产、充值提现、KYC等）的功能测试与回归测试。
* 根据需求制定测试计划，设计高质量的测试用例，识别潜在缺陷和风险。
* 参与接口测试、前后端联调测试，保障数据交互准确。
* 执行系统性能测试与压测，模拟高并发交易场景，评估系统容量与稳定性。
* 维护与开发自动化测试脚本，推动自动化在回归与接口测试中的应用。
* 参与CI/CD流程，确保持续集成、持续交付下的质量验证。
* 配合安全团队进行数据安全、权限校验、防刷防爆破等方面的测试。
* 梳理测试文档，输出测试报告与缺陷追踪报告，提升项目可控性与透明度。
* 协作开发、产品、运维等多部门，快速定位线上问题并推动闭环解决。

任职要求：
* 本科及以上学历，计算机相关专业优先，3-6年软件测试经验。
* 熟练掌握功能测试、回归测试、接口测试的设计与执行方法。
* 具备性能测试经验，熟悉JMeter、Locust、k6等性能测试工具。
* 熟悉至少一种编程语言（如Python、Java、JavaScript），具备接口自动化测试 经验。
* 熟悉缺陷管理与追踪工具（如JIRA），了解基本的测试流程与项目管理。
* 理解持续集成（CI/CD）流程，能够与开发团队协同推进质量保障。
* 逻辑思维严谨，具备优秀的问题分析与解决能力，沟通协作能力强。
* 适应高强度工作节奏，有较强的自驱力与责任心。

加分项：
* 有中心化交易所（CEX）、金融交易系统测试经验者优先。
* 熟悉区块链基本原理，如钱包签名、合约调用、节点交互。
* 有测试平台建设、流程优化或自研工具开发经验。
* 有一定的后端性能分析和调优能力（了解Java/Golang服务端架构优先）。
* 英语读写能力良好，能理解英文文档或与海外团队协作。

工作模式与薪酬：
* 提供具备竞争力的薪资与福利待遇。
* 适应敏捷开发环境，可接受创业团队的 6 天工作制和远程工作模式（团队时区：北京时间）。

我们提供：

jobs.summary:
## About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.
jobs.raw_body:
## About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.

## Responsibilities
● Server-side wallet system design and development: Responsible for the architecture design, development, and optimization of the system’s server-side wallet to ensure efficient and stable handling of large-scale transaction requests
● Multi-chain wallet support: Develop and maintain a hot wallet system that supports multiple blockchains to ensure compatibility and stability
● Private key management: Implement and maintain a secure private key management solution to prevent key leakage and unauthorized access
● Signature algorithm implementation: Implement and optimize cryptographic signature algorithms to ensure the authenticity and integrity of transactions
● Transaction security: Develop and maintain cryptocurrency recharge/aggregate/withdrawal functions to ensure the security of the transaction process and prevent various security threats
● Troubleshooting and fixing: Monitor the system’s operational status, promptly address and fix any technical issues that may arise
● Documentation writing: Write and maintain relevant technical documentation to ensure team members can accurately understand and use the system.

## Requirements
● Educational background: Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields
● Experience working in exchanges is preferred
● Proficient in the design and implementation of HD wallets, hot wallets, and multi-chain wallets
● Experience in secure development of cryptocurrency recharge/aggregate/withdrawal
● Understanding of basic networking knowledge, TCP/IP, UDP, HTTP, and other network protocols, Websocket
● Familiarity with various data structures and algorithms, research on cryptography, security protocols, and encryption algorithms
● Proficiency in the principles, mechanisms, and related encryption algorithms of popular blockchains such as Bitcoin, Ethereum. Familiar with private key management, signature algorithms (e.g., ECDSA, EdDSA), and their applications in cryptocurrencies
● Familiar with common Internet technologies, including but not limited to MySQL, NoSQL, RPC, MQ, caching technology, microservices architecture, etc.
● Proficiency in Java, with familiarity with Go as a bonus
● Familiarity with hardware signature device (HSM) access solutions is preferred


## Job Nature
Finance, Blockchain

Full-time or not: Full-time
Remote or not: Remote work can be considered in other domestic cities besides Hong Kong and Shenzhen

## Contact

jobs.raw_body:
## About
Our Mission
To revolutionize the way people and businesses transact by providing efficient, reliable, and innovative payment solutions tailored to the unique needs of our clients.

## Responsibilities
【岗位职责】  
1. 使用Flutter框架参与跨平台移动应用开发，专注于iOS平台，确保功能实现和用户体验的一致性。  
2. 根据产品需求实现界面开发和功能逻辑，配合团队完成技术方案的实施。  
3. 协助优化Flutter应用的性能，包括界面渲染、启动速度等，提升用户交互体验。  
4. 开发和维护基础组件库，编写高复用性代码，支持项目快速迭代。  
5. 参与Bug修复和版本更新，协助完成功能的持续优化与迭代开发。  
6. 学习和探索Flutter相关新技术，为团队积累技术经验，提升项目质量。  
7. 简单参与动态打包和构建优化，协助提高开发与发布效率。  
8. 撰写基础技术文档，记录开发流程和经验，提升团队协作效率。  

## Requirements
【岗位要求】  
1. 计算机相关专业毕业，3年以上移动端开发经验，1年以上Flutter开发经验。  
2. 熟悉Flutter框架，掌握Dart语言，具备一定的跨平台开发经验。  
3. 有iOS原生开发经验，熟悉相关工具链（如Xcode）和调试工具。  
4. 了解iOS平台的开发流程，熟悉应用性能优化和界面适配等基础技术。  
5. 熟悉主流UI开发规范（如Cupertino设计），能够实现基础界面和交互效果。  
6. 熟悉Git版本控制系统，能够独立完成代码提交和版本管理。  
7. 具备良好的团队协作和沟通能力，能够与产品、设计和后端开发人员紧密配合。  
8. 对Flutter插件开发有基础了解者优先，对移动端热更新机制有学习意愿者优先。  
9. 学习能力强，乐于接受技术挑战，能够在指导下完成较复杂的任务。

- Remote or not: Not remote

jobs.location: 全远程，按北京时间工作
jobs.summary:
公司/团队介绍
排名前十 CEX
jobs.raw_body:
公司/团队介绍
排名前十 CEX

薪资福利待遇
薪水 30K-50K（优秀者具体面议）
五险一金/年终奖金/团建经费/节日福利

地点
工作地点：全远程，按北京时间工作
联系方式：WeChat: xxpan_px ; TG:Yang_syz ; Email : yxin0219@126.com

岗位要求、职责

岗位职责
1、区块链集成与开发：负责 Solana、Tron、TON 等区块链的后端开发，包括链上数据解析、智能合约交互、交易处理等功能。
2、数据解析与存储：设计并优化区块链数据索引和解析方案，确保高效存储和快速查询交易数据、账户信息、NFT 资产等。
3、智能合约交互：开发与智能合约交互的 API 服务，封装智能合约调用，实现链上业务逻辑。
4、高性能后端开发：使用 Go、Rust 或 [Node.js](http://node.js/) 开发高并发、高可用的后端服务，优化链上数据获取和同步方案。
5、分布式架构与数据库：负责链上数据的存储方案，包括使用 PostgreSQL、ClickHouse、Doris、MongoDB 等数据库进行数据存储和分析。
6、Web3 服务与 API 开发：设计并开发 Web3 相关 API，例如钱包服务、DApp 后端、跨链桥对接等。
7、性能优化：优化 RPC 请求、提升节点同步速度、降低存储成本，提高系统稳定性与响应速度。
8、安全与合规：研究和解决私钥管理、权限控制、交易安全等安全性问题，保证系统的合规性和安全性。
9、团队协作：与前端开发、产品经理、智能合约开发团队协作，推动项目落地并优化用户体验。

任职要求
1、编程语言：精通 Go / Rust / [Node.js](http://node.js/) / Python 至少两种，有扎实的计算机基础。
2、区块链开发经验：熟悉 Solana、Tron、TON 至少一条链的开发，包括 RPC、SDK、智能合约交互等。
3、熟悉区块链原理：掌握交易结构、账户模型、存储方式、共识机制等核心概念。
4、智能合约交互：掌握 Solidity、Rust (Solana)、FunC (TON) 等智能合约语言，能编写和解析智能合约调用数据。
5、数据库与存储：熟悉 SQL / NoSQL 数据库，如 PostgreSQL、MongoDB、ClickHouse、Doris，并有大规模数据处理经验。
6、区块链解析：有区块链数据索引、链上数据解析、链上事件监听的经验，能实现区块链同步方案。
7、分布式系统：有 Kafka、Redis、gRPC、微服务架构经验，能设计高可用的区块链数据同步系统。
8、网络与安全：了解 Web3 安全问题，如密钥管理、签名机制、防止重放攻击等。
9、性能优化：有 RPC 优化、数据库查询优化、高性能后端架构设计的经验。
10、团队协作：良好的沟通能力，能与前端、合约开发、产品团队协作，推动项目落地。

jobs.title: (远程)-加密货币交易所 风控策略岗位
jobs.summary: 【岗位职责】
jobs.raw_body:
【岗位职责】

风控策略与用户行为分析
	•	识别用户异常交易行为，如刷量套利、羊毛党、异常盈亏等，协助制定识别与处置策略；
	•	审核平台交易订单及资金流转，确保链上链下交易安全；
	•	制定并持续优化防控脚本、异常识别规则及风控响应流程；
	•	评估代理用户画像及贡献度，制定奖惩激励机制，打击低价值代理；

流动性与盘口数据分析
	•	跟踪CMC、CG 排名优化数据，保持币种在主流榜单内的活跃度；
	•	分析币种流动性、盘口数据、成交对手方结构，评估潜在操纵行为；
	•	构建大币种对冲策略与合约仓位预警指标，辅助平台风控调控；
	•	监控行情偏离、异常滑点、合约深度异常，规避用户一键扫仓风险；

数据驱动型策略制定
	•	搭建风控分析看板和盘面指标体系，辅助高效定位高风险用户与关键行为；
	•	使用多维数据（如交易行为、资金效率、杠杆使用率）进行实时画像；
	•	协助发现赠金套利、手续费套利等异常行为并建立处置机制；

跨部门协作
	•	与运营、合规、产品及数据团队紧密配合，推动风控策略落地执行；
	•	主导制定风险用户处置分级方案，输出可执行的黑名单策略与用户限制方案。

⸻

【任职要求】
	•	5 年以上加密交易所风控、策略、数据分析或流动性管理经验；
	•	熟悉 CEX 交易模型、币对撮合机制、合约风控逻辑与代理系统机制；
	•	熟练掌握数据分析工具（Python、SQL、Pandas、Tableau 等），可独立开展策略建模；
	•	对盘口、用户行为、套利模式具备较高敏感度，具备实战分析经验者优先；
	•	可接受轮班工作制，适应高频、高强度的市场节奏。

联系方式：@PicoAng

https://cloudie.hk/index.html
成為全球領先的高級網絡托管服務提供商。我們使在線企業能夠利用我們的IT基礎設施來獲得競爭優勢。通過提供一套經過驗證的托管和管理服務，我們希望公司專注於其在線業務的核心，並讓我們管理他們的IT托管基礎架構。

我們的理念一直是讓公司能夠在沒有任何限制的情況下在線開展業務，並以合理的價格輕松獲得世界級的IT基礎設施。這使我們成為IT托管解決方案的領先供應商之一。我們一直致力於提供始終如一的服務水平，從全天候的專業客戶支持到專門量身定制的托管服務，以滿足任何業務需求。

3.進行綜合佈線及機房基礎設施的運維，及時回應異常情況；

3.具備較強的問題分析與解決能力，能夠高效回應突發情況；
4.具備良好的溝通能力和團隊合作精神，能與不同團隊高效協作；

jobs.title: [Hong Kong/Remote] SynFutures is seeking skilled AI Agent Engineers to design and develop cutting-edge AI agents that enhance user interactions within our DeFi ecosystem.
jobs.salary: includes competitive base cash, bonuses, and token allocations.
jobs.summary: **About SynFutures**
jobs.raw_body:
**About SynFutures**
 
SynFutures ($F) is a leading decentralized exchange and full-stack financial infrastructure provider. Leveraging its innovative Oyster AMM model and fully onchain order-matching engine, SynFutures empowers anyone to list and trade any asset with leverage. With the debut of its AI assistant, Synthia, SynFutures is enhancing decentralized finance infrastructure with advanced intelligence and a seamless user experience.

Backed by top-tier institutions including Pantera, Polychain, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, Framework, and SIG, SynFutures dominates the decentralized perpetual futures market on Base with over 50% market share and ranks among the top five globally.

To learn more, visit [www.synfutures.com](http://www.synfutures.com/)

**Roles & Responsibilities**

We are seeking skilled AI Agent Engineers to design and develop cutting-edge AI agents that enhance user interactions within our DeFi ecosystem. You’ll harness LLMs, and frameworks like AutoGen and CrewAI to build autonomous agents that interpret user intent, analyze market trends, and execute on-chain strategies. While basic blockchain knowledge is helpful, your primary focus will be on creating robust AI systems that integrate with our DeFi platform, collaborating with our blockchain engineers to bring DeFAI to life.

**【Responsibilities】**
1. Develop AI Agents: Design and implement autonomous AI agents using LLMs and machine learning to perform on-chain actions (e.g., token transfers, swaps, yield optimization) based on user inputs and market conditions.
2. LLM Integration: Leverage LLMs (e.g., Grok, GPT-based models) with tools like AutoGen to enable natural language processing, allowing agents to handle on-chain action and multi-step dialogues.
3. Agent Collaboration: Use frameworks like CrewAI to create multi-agent systems that coordinate tasks (e.g., one agent analyzes trends while another executes swaps).
4. Data Pipeline Development: Construct pipelines to preprocess and feed AI agents with real-time data, including on-chain metrics (via APIs like The Graph) and off-chain sources (e.g., price feeds, KOL tweets, medium news).
5. Agent Optimization: Enhance agent capabilities with techniques like RAG, LLM fine-tuning, or memory persistence for contextual awareness.
6. Collaboration: Work with blockchain engineers to integrate AI agents with DeFi protocols (e.g., Perp, Spot, Loan) and smart contracts, ensuring seamless on-chain execution.
7. Research and Innovation: Explore cutting-edge AI tools (e.g., AutoGen, CrewAI) and DeFAI trends to advance agent functionality.

**【Requirements】**
  **Experience:** 
1. 3+ years in software engineering, with experience focuseing on AI, LLMs, or machine learning development.
2. Proven experience deploying AI/ML models in production environments.

  **Technical Skills:**
1. Expertise in Python and AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers).
2. Strong knowledge of LLMs, including fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and API integration (e.g., xAI, OpenAI).
3. Familiarity with AI agent frameworks like AutoGen or CrewAI for building autonomous or multi-agent systems.
4. Experience with data pipelines and processing large datasets (e.g., Pandas, NumPy, or cloud tools like AWS/GCP).
5. Basic understanding of blockchain/DeFi concepts (e.g., wallets, transactions) and Web3 libraries (e.g., Web3.py, ethers.js).
6. Programming Languages: Python (primary), with JavaScript/TypeScript as a plus.
7. Passion: Enthusiasm for AI, LLMs, and their application in DeFi/Web3 innovation.

**Preferred Qualifications**
1. Experience with AutoGen for LLM-driven agent development or CrewAI for multi-agent coordination.
2. Familiarity with DeFi protocols (e.g., Uniswap, Curve) and on-chain data tools (e.g., The Graph, Chainlink).
3. Contributions to open-source AI or DeFi projects (e.g., GitHub repos).
4. Knowledge of RAG frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex) or agent ecosystems like Autonolas.


**Contract details**

1. Location: Based in Hong Kong (remote work options available).
2. Travel requirement: low.
3. Compensation: includes competitive base cash, bonuses, and token allocations.

**How to apply**

Submit your CV to [hiring@synfutures.com]with title AI-AGENT ENGINEER from Rebase _[your name]
jobs.author: sarahshe80

## 岗位要求、职责
岗位名称：Web3 Platform Token Operations Lead Web3平台代币运营负责人
我们正在寻找一位经验丰富的 Web3平台代币运营负责人，负责设计、执行和优化我们交易所原生代币的生态系统策略。理想的候选人应具备加密货币交易所代币运营的成功经验，并熟悉DeFi/GameFi项目。
主要职责：
1.全面负责平台代币的生态系统运营，包括代币经济学设计、流动性管理、用户增长和合作伙伴整合。
2.推动代币实用性扩展，与内部团队和外部项目合作，实施使用场景（如交易费折扣、质押、治理）。
3.设计和执行代币相关活动（如空投、质押奖励、社区激励），以提高持有者参与度和品牌知名度。
4.监控代币市场表现和链上数据，分析用户行为和竞争趋势，并迭代运营策略。
5.探索与DeFi协议和GameFi项目的合作机会，创新代币使用场景。
6.协调跨职能团队（技术、市场、业务），确保代币运营与公司目标一致。
7.领导运营团队，设定OKR/KPI，并确保高质量执行。

任职要求
1.三年以上加密货币交易所代币或区块链原生代币运营经验，并实际参与过代币发行、生态系统开发或通缩模型设计。
2.具备DeFi/GameFi项目运营经验，包括流动性挖矿、NFT经济或DAO治理机制。
中英文双语流利（用于全球和区域协作），具备出色的跨文化沟通能力。
3.数据驱动思维，熟练使用链上分析工具（如Dune Analytics、Nansen）和数据看板管理。
4.强大的项目管理能力，能够协调涉及多个利益相关者的复杂项目。
5.对Web3趋势有深刻理解，并拥有丰富的行业人脉。

优先条件
具备区块链或智能合约开发的技术背景。
拥有与DeFi协议、GameFi社区或交易所核心用户群体的现有联系。
在推动代币价值增长方面有成功经验（如市值增长、实用性突破）。

jobs.summary:
## 公司/团队介绍
NovaX 是一家处于 Web3 前沿的中心化交易所（CEX），我们以创新技术和用户为本的解决方案，致力于重塑区块链行业的格局。我们团队对 Web3 技术充满热情，积极探索 Web3 各个领域的可能性，力求打造一个创新、安全、高效的数字资产交易平台，并围绕核心业务孵化各类 Web3 子项目，构建完善的生态系统。我们的使命是让每个人都能轻松踏入数字资产的世界，实现普惠金融。加入 NovaX，与我们一起开创 Web3 的未来！

## 公司/团队介绍
NovaX 是一家处于 Web3 前沿的中心化交易所（CEX），我们以创新技术和用户为本的解决方案，致力于重塑区块链行业的格局。我们团队对 Web3 技术充满热情，积极探索 Web3 各个领域的可能性，力求打造一个创新、安全、高效的数字资产交易平台，并围绕核心业务孵化各类 Web3 子项目，构建完善的生态系统。我们的使命是让每个人都能轻松踏入数字资产的世界，实现普惠金融。加入 NovaX，与我们一起开创 Web3 的未来！

jobs.summary: 前端开发工程师 (远程) Web3 交易所
jobs.raw_body:
前端开发工程师 (远程) Web3 交易所

**职位概述：**
我们正在寻找一名前端开发工程师，负责交易平台 Web 端的开发和优化。该职位需要与后端、产品团队紧密合作，推动高性能前端架构的搭建，优化用户体验，并确保交易系统的稳定性和高效交互。

**岗位优势：**
✅ 核心业务，直接影响交易体验 —— 参与交易平台核心系统开发，优化交易界面，提高性能和交互体验。
✅ 工程化与架构升级 —— 参与前端架构优化、工程化建设，提高代码质量和开发效率。
✅ 敏捷团队，灵活高效 —— 在小而精的团队中快速推进项目，提升业务能力。

**公司简介：**
- 团队背景： 成员来自全球前五大交易所核心团队、BAT 互联网技术高管、量化交易、风险投资等领域。
- 高效创收： 小而精的产研团队，上线 3 个月达到收支平衡，当前团队约 40 人。 

**岗位职责：**
- 负责加密货币交易平台 Web 端的功能开发与维护，确保系统稳定、高效的用户体验。
- 参与前端架构设计及性能优化，在高并发场景下确保页面渲染顺畅。
- 处理 WebSocket、API 等数据交互，优化行情展示（如 K 线图、订单簿）。
- 协同后端、产品等团队，高效推进项目落地，持续迭代并提升产品质量。

**任职要求：**
- 统招本科及以上学历，5 年以上前端开发经验，基础扎实。
- 精通 HTML5、CSS3、JavaScript、TypeScript，熟练使用 React、Vue、Webpack、Vite 等主流技术。
- 具备一定的前端架构设计及性能优化经验，拥有良好的工程化意识。
- 善于总结和分析问题，能产出合理、通用的技术解决方案。
- 具备优秀的沟通能力和推动力，能够与跨部门团队协同作战。
- 对技术充满热情，精益求精，能适应高强度工作节奏。
- 欢迎非加密货币行业的互联网背景开发者，但需具备快速学习和适应能力。

**加分项：**
- 有金融交易所或高并发业务实战经验。
- 熟悉 Web3.js / Ethers.js，了解钱包交互与智能合约调用。
- 有 TradingView、ECharts 等数据可视化或行情图表开发经验。
- 对区块链行业有兴趣或经验，愿意投身加密货币领域。

**工作模式与薪酬：**
- 提供具备竞争力的福利待遇。
- 适应敏捷开发环境，可接受创业团队的 6 天工作制和远程工作模式（团队时区：北京时间）。

jobs.raw_body:

✅ 工程化与架构升级 —— 参与前端架构优化、工程化建设，提高代码质量和开发效率。
✅ 敏捷团队，灵活高效 —— 在小而精的团队中快速推进项目，提升业务能力。

- 具备一定的前端架构设计及性能优化经验，拥有良好的工程化意识。
- 善于总结和分析问题，能产出合理、通用的技术解决方案。

- 对技术充满热情，精益求精，能适应高强度工作节奏。
- 欢迎非加密货币行业的互联网背景开发者，但需具备快速学习和适应能力。

**加分项：**
- 有金融交易所或高并发业务实战经验。
- 熟悉 Web3.js / Ethers.js，了解钱包交互与智能合约调用。
- 有 TradingView、ECharts 等数据可视化或行情图表开发经验。
- 对区块链行业有兴趣或经验，愿意投身加密货币领域。
-
工作模式与薪酬：
- 提供具备竞争力的福利待遇。
- 适应敏捷开发环境，可接受创业团队的 6 天工作制和远程工作模式（团队时区：北京时间）。

jobs.summary:
## About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.
jobs.raw_body:
## About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.

## Responsibilities
- Responsible for developing the core functions of the Internet financial platform, build the technology infrastructure that supports digital asset trading on the internet 
- Implement internal native protocol to process market data 
- Implement batch reports in the data warehouse for compliance and business analysis 
- Establish a robust, efficient and concurrent trading system to ensure 7×24 hours uninterrupted operation  
- Actively conduct efficient communication with product team and business development team, collect requirements, participate in product planning and system design 
- Propose practical and feasible solutions, capable of producing technical documents independently

## Requirements
- Computer Science or related Engineering Bachelor (or above) from top tier university 
- 3 years or more working experience 
- Proficient in Python Programming 
- Familiar with large-scale and high-performance distributed system 
- Familiar with data structures, algorithms, design patterns, network programming 
- Familiar with data analysis framework and data warehouse processing 
- Proficient in tools like caching, message queuing, and searching, e.q., Redis, Kafka, and Elasticsearch 
- Familiar with Linux 
- Experience in developing financial-related product, or have work experience in a large Internet company 
- Able to adapt to high pressure working environment 
- Great abilities in system analyzing, abstract thinking and system designing 
- Work proactively, have a strong team spirit, and be self-driven to tackle difficulties and solve problems 


## Job Nature
Finance, Blockchain

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: Remote work can be considered in other domestic cities besides Hong Kong and Shenzhen

## Contact
email: hr@ex.io

jobs.responsibilities: 1、系统设计与开发 根据交易所业务需求，设计和开发安全可靠的数字资产钱包系统，包括但不限于比特币、以太坊等主流数字货币钱包。 参与钱包系统的架构设计，优化系统性能，确保钱包在高并发场景下的稳定运行。 实现钱包的核心功能，如充值、提现、归集、转冷等，保证交易的准确性和及时性。 2、安全保障 采用先进的加密技术和安全机制，保障用户钱包资产的安全，防止私钥泄露、黑客攻击等安全风险。 进行安全漏洞检测和修复，定期对钱包系统进行安全审计，及时发现并解决潜在的安全问题。 制定和完善钱包安全策略，确保系统符合行业安全标准和监管要求。 3、节点搭建与维护 负责区块链节点的搭建与维护。 4、系统维护 及时处理钱包系统运行过程中出现的问题，提供技术支持和解决方案。 对钱包系统进行性能监控和分析，不断优化系统性能，提升用户体验。 收集用户反馈和业务需求，对钱包系统进行功能迭代和优化。

- 参与钱包系统的架构设计，优化系统性能，确保钱包在高并发场景下的稳定运行。
- 实现钱包的核心功能，如充值、提现、归集、转冷等，保证交易的准确性和及时性。
 2、安全保障
- 采用先进的加密技术和安全机制，保障用户钱包资产的安全，防止私钥泄露、黑客攻击等安全风险。
- 进行安全漏洞检测和修复，定期对钱包系统进行安全审计，及时发现并解决潜在的安全问题。
- 制定和完善钱包安全策略，确保系统符合行业安全标准和监管要求。
 3、节点搭建与维护
- 负责区块链节点的搭建与维护。
 4、系统维护
- 及时处理钱包系统运行过程中出现的问题，提供技术支持和解决方案。
- 对钱包系统进行性能监控和分析，不断优化系统性能，提升用户体验。
- 收集用户反馈和业务需求，对钱包系统进行功能迭代和优化。

jobs.location: Based in Hong Kong (remote work options available).

jobs.summary: **About SynFutures**
jobs.raw_body:
**About SynFutures**
 
SynFutures ($F) is a leading decentralized exchange and full-stack financial infrastructure provider. Leveraging its innovative Oyster AMM model and fully onchain order-matching engine, SynFutures empowers anyone to list and trade any asset with leverage. With the debut of its AI assistant, Synthia, SynFutures is enhancing decentralized finance infrastructure with advanced intelligence and a seamless user experience.

Backed by top-tier institutions including Pantera, Polychain, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, Framework, and SIG, SynFutures dominates the decentralized perpetual futures market on Base with over 50% market share and ranks among the top five globally.

To learn more, visit http://www.synfutures.com/

**Roles & Responsibilities**

SynFutures is looking for passionate and experienced professionals to join our team. We are currently hiring for two key positions: AI x Blockchain Engineer and DeFi Trader.

 
**【AI x Blockchain Engineer】**

We are seeking an AI x Blockchain Engineer with a strong background in AI, trading, and blockchain technology. This role focuses on AI-driven data signal processing, trading strategy development, and building an AI-Web3 infrastructure for DeFi. The ideal candidate should have deep expertise in AI models, algorithmic trading, and blockchain infrastructure.

**Responsibilities:**
•	Develop AI & Web3 Infrastructure
o	Build and maintain a scalable AI-powered Web3 framework for DeFi applications.
o	Ensure robust security and efficiency in AI-integrated blockchain solutions.
•	AI-Powered Data Processing & Trading
o	Design AI algorithms for real-time data signal analysis and decision-making.
o	Develop algorithmic trading strategies leveraging blockchain data.
•	Research & Development
o	Stay updated on AI, blockchain, and DeFi advancements.
o	Conduct research to enhance trading strategies and infrastructure.
•	Collaboration & Innovation
o	Work closely with cross-functional teams to drive innovation.
o	Contribute to the company’s overall strategy and vision.
**Requirements:**
•	PhD in Computer Science, Mathematics, Machine Learning, or a related field.
•	Strong passion for blockchain, smart contracts, and DeFi protocols.
•	Proficiency in programming languages for AI and trading systems.
•	Experience in building trading systems and financial market models.
•	Knowledge of trading and real-time data processing is a plus.

 
**【DeFi Trader】**
As a DeFi Trader, you will manage and optimize algorithmic trading strategies in decentralized finance (DeFi), with a focus on market making and trading on on-chain DEXs. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in crypto markets, algorithmic trading, and DeFi protocols.

**Responsibilities:**
•	Develop & Execute Trading Strategies
o	Design and optimize algorithmic trading & liquidity provision strategies.
o	Monitor market conditions to identify opportunities and mitigate risks.
•	Collaborate & Innovate
o	Work with smart contract developers to ensure seamless strategy integration.
o	Stay ahead of emerging trends in DeFi and blockchain technology.
**Requirements:**
•	Bachelor’s degree or higher in Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, or related fields.
•	2+ years of experience in onchain crypto trading or market 
•	Strong coding skills in JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or similar languages.
•	Deep understanding of DeFi protocols and blockchain ecosystems.
•	Solid grasp of financial concepts and risk management.
•	Ability to work independently and in a distributed team environment.


**Contract details**

1.	Location: Based in Hong Kong (remote work options available).
2.	Travel requirement: low.
3.	Compensation: includes competitive base cash, bonuses, and token allocations.

**How to apply**

Submit your CV to **hiring@synfutures.com**with title **DeFi Trader_[your name]from Rebase**, or **AI x Blockchain Engineer _[your name]from Rebase**.

jobs.title: SynFutures is looking to a passionate and experienced Product Manager to lead our Innovation product line
jobs.summary: **About SynFutures**
jobs.raw_body:
**About SynFutures**
 
SynFutures is a leading decentralized exchange and full-stack financial infrastructure provider. Utilizing its innovative Oyster AMM model and a fully on-chain order-matching engine, SynFutures enables anyone to list and trade any asset with leverage. 

Backed by top-tier institutions like Pantera, Polychain, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, Framework and SIG, SynFutures is building an all-in-one platform for spot, perpetual, and wealth management, streamlining DeFi for all.

For more info, visit our website: http://www.synfutures.com/

**Roles & Responsibilities**

SynFutures is looking to a passionate and experienced Product Manager to lead our Innovation product line. You will be responsible for guiding the development and execution of innovative DeFi solutions integrated with cutting-edge AI technologies. You will play a pivotal role in shaping product strategy, managing the product lifecycle, and ensuring the successful delivery of AI-driven DeFi solutions that meet market needs and drive business growth. 

**Responsibilities include:**
1.	Product Strategy & Vision:
(1)	Define and communicate the vision for AI + DeFi products, ensuring alignment with business objectives and market opportunities.
(2)	Conduct market research to understand trends in the DeFi and AI spaces, identifying gaps and opportunities for innovation.
(3)	Build a comprehensive product roadmap, prioritizing features and capabilities that maximize value for users and stakeholders. 
2.	Cross-functional Leadership:
(1)	Collaborate with engineering, data science, design, marketing, and business teams to define product requirements, ensure smooth development, and deliver high-quality AI-powered DeFi solutions.
(2)	Lead product discovery, design, and validation processes, leveraging user feedback and AI advancements to continuously refine and improve product offerings.
3.	Product Development & Delivery:
(1)	Oversee the entire product lifecycle from ideation to launch, ensuring timely delivery within scope and budget.
(2)	Work closely with engineering teams to develop technical specifications and ensure AI models are properly integrated into DeFi products.
(3)	Define key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success and use data-driven insights to guide product iterations and improvements.
(4)	Gather and analyze feedback from users, clients, and business leaders to continuously refine the product and ensure market fit.
4.	AI + DeFi Expertise:
(1)	Stay up-to-date on the latest trends in AI and DeFi, integrating cutting-edge technologies to create competitive advantages.
(2)	Understand the regulatory landscape in the DeFi space and work with legal and compliance teams to ensure that products adhere to relevant standards.
5.	Risk Management:
(1)	Proactively identify potential risks related to product development, including technical challenges, market shifts, and regulatory changes.
(2)	Work with relevant teams to mitigate risks and ensure that AI models and DeFi solutions are robust, secure, and scalable.

**Requirements**
(1)	2-5 years proven experiences in product management.
(2)	Heavy user of decentralized finance protocols, AI technologies, and their intersection.
(3)	Exceptional leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
(4)	Strong problem-solving abilities with a data-driven, customer-centric approach.
(5)	Experience with agile methodologies and tools for product development and management.
(6)	Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
(7)   Chinese speaking.

**Preferred Qualifications:**
(1)	Advanced degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
(2)	Familiarity with smart contracts, blockchain platforms (e.g., Ethereum, Solana), and DeFi protocols.
(3)	Previous experience in launching AI-powered products in the finance or blockchain sectors.

**Contract details**
1.	Location: remote/Hong Kong
2.	Travel requirement: low to moderate.
3.	Compensation: competitive with team tokens

**How to apply**
Submit your CV to [hiring@synfutures.com] with title **Product Manager_[your name] from Rebase**

## 薪资福利待遇
1.高級安全研究員：100K RMB (能力優秀面議更高)
2.產品經理：16-30K  RMB


## 地点

- 工作地点：遠端
- 联系方式：TG: https://t.me/Mars_Lucas

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是
- 时区要求：（GMT+8优先，可覆盖核心工作时间，可适应国际分布式团队协作）
  
## 岗位要求、职责
1高級安全研究員：
【工作內容】
1. 漏洞挖掘與分析：針對 Web、移動端、伺服器、二進位程式、瀏覽器等進行漏洞挖掘、分析及利用，研究 0day/Nday 漏洞。
2. 代碼審計：對複雜專案代碼進行安全審查，發現邏輯漏洞、內存安全性漏洞等，並提供修復建議。
3. 二進位安全研究：分析作業系統、瀏覽器、內核、IoT 設備等的二進位漏洞，並研究緩解方案。
4. 安全工具開發：開發自動化漏洞挖掘、Fuzzing、逆向分析等工具，提高研究效率。
5. 前沿技術跟蹤：持續研究最新的安全性漏洞、攻擊技巧和防禦策略，保持技術領先優勢。
6. 安全報告與文檔撰寫：撰寫漏洞分析報告、研究論文、安全最佳實踐文檔，並能向技術和非技術人員傳達安全風險。

【必備技能】
1. 教育背景：電訊工程、網路安全、資訊安全或相關領域的學士學位及以上。
2. 安全研究經驗：具備豐富的安全領域知識，擁有真實漏洞挖掘與利用經驗，能夠解決高級安全問題。
3. 程式設計技能：熟練掌握 C/C++、Go、Java、Python、PHP 或其他主流程式設計語言，能夠深入分析複雜的原始程式碼及二進位碼。
4. 代碼審計能力：能夠進行靜態/動態代碼審計，識別高級漏洞，如記憶體管理漏洞（UAF、堆溢出等）、Web 安全性漏洞（SQL 注入、RCE、SSRF 等）。
5. 逆向工程：熟悉反彙編和調試分析工具（如 IDA Pro、WinDbg、Ghidra、Radare2、OD 等），能夠熟練閱讀和理解反彙編代碼。
6. 高級安全測試工具：精通 Fuzzing（AFL、LibFuzzer、Honggfuzz）、符號執行（Angr、Triton）、漏洞利用開發（ROP、Heap Spraying）等高級安全技術。
系統安全評估：對 Windows/Linux/流覽器內核安全有深入理解，能夠分析漏洞成因，並提供高效的防禦方案。
7. CTF 及安全競賽經驗：具備 CTF 競賽經驗，能夠獨立開發安全工具或 Exploit 代碼。

2產品經理：
【工作內容】
1.負責資安產品的需求、功能設計、定價、開發、測試、銷售、市場/競品分析
2.根據用戶反饋及業務數據，分析用戶痛並及提出產品優化方案
3.主動召開定期會議，確保服務推廣符合時程規劃進行，帶領團隊持續提升產品體驗。

【必備技能】
1.資訊科技相關科系畢業，3年以上網路安全相關產品經驗
2.具網路/資安/雲服務系統維運相關知識
3.具良好團隊合作精神，善於溝通表達
4.具危機處理（評估風險與利害關係），一定抗壓能力
5.具軟體程式開發實務經驗佳(不限程式語言)。

有其他链的经验

jobs.raw_body:
职位描述：
1、产品规划与策略：
深入了解Web3生态系统，结合用户需求，制定具有创新性和竞争力的产品战略与规划，
2、需求调研与分析：
开展市场调研，分析市场需求、竞争环境和用户反馈，识别新的产品机会和增长点。对需求进行深入分析和优先级排序，为产品的迭代升级提供有力依据。
3、产品设计与建设：
完成公司Web3产品的功能特性、用户体验、底层逻辑等的设计，输出基于计算机系统设计视角的高标尺、手册型需求文档，确保产品在市场上的独特价值。关注用户体验，设计简洁、直观的界面，确保用户能够轻松使用复杂的Web3技术。
4、项目管理与推进：
协调研发、设计、运营等跨部门团队，制定详细的项目计划，明确项目目标、时间节点和任务分工，确保产品按时、高质量交付。有效监控项目进度，及时解决项目中出现的问题和风险，保障项目顺利推进。
5、数据分析与优化：
建立完善的产品数据指标体系，通过数据分析评估产品性能和用户行为，及时发现问题并提出优化建议，以数据驱动产品持续改进，提升产品的市场竞争力。

任职要求：
1、专业背景：
本科及以上学历，计算机科学、软件工程、金融科技、经济学等相关专业优先，对区块链和Web3技术有浓厚兴趣和深入理解。
2、工作经验：
1）3年以上Web3平台产品经理工作经验，5年以上一线互联网平台产品经理工作经验。
2）熟悉Web3产品的开发流程和技术架构，了解智能合约开发、区块链浏览器、钱包应用等Web3基础设施，熟悉Web3的主流产品形态和玩儿法。
3）有完善的用户体验相关产品经验，负责过互联网用户体验产品建设相关工作，有出海产品经验优先考虑。
3、技能要求：
1）具备出色的产品设计能力，能够独立负责产品的全生命周期。
2）对客户端之于用户的作用及使命有足够认知，能够就客户端功能及体验，输出内容详实、细节丰富的需求文档，以保证产研团队能够高标准交付功能完善、体验足够优秀的客户端。
3）对服务端在整个系统的作用和任务有充分的理解，能够设计完备、闭环的服务端业务流程和底逻逻辑，并输出对应的、基于系统实现思维的需求说明，保证系统建设和迭代过程中的高可用性、易可扩展性、可靠性、低耦合性等。
4）对客户端与服务端数据交互方式、特点有充分了解，能够基于客户端用户体验要求及系统性能等方面，在需求文档中，详尽给出各类数据、操作反馈等的客户端与服务端间的数据交互说明。
5）具备数据驱动思维，能够通过数据分析发现问题并提出解决方案。
6）对用户体验有深刻理解，能够设计简洁、易用的产品界面。
7）具备良好的项目管理能力，熟悉敏捷开发流程，能够有效协调资源，推动项目进展。
4、能力素质：
1）具备敏锐的市场洞察力和创新思维，能够快速捕捉行业动态和市场机会。
2）拥有优秀的沟通协调能力和团队合作精神，能够与不同背景的人员进行高效沟通和协作。
3）具备较强的问题解决能力和抗压能力，在面对复杂问题和挑战时能够保持冷静，迅速找到解决方案。
4）能够很好的将业务需求转化为系统思维和框架下的需求文档。
5、行业认知：
对Web3行业的发展趋势和应用场景有深刻理解，关注行业前沿技术和创新模式，积极参与行业交流活动，不断提升自身的行业认知水平。

jobs.title: [China/Hong Kong] (Compliance Crypto Exchange) is looking for Custody Developer
jobs.summary:
## About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.
jobs.raw_body:
## About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.

## Responsibilities
● Server-side wallet system design and development: Responsible for the architecture design, development, and optimization of the system’s server-side wallet to ensure efficient and stable handling of large-scale transaction requests
● Multi-chain wallet support: Develop and maintain a hot wallet system that supports multiple blockchains to ensure compatibility and stability
● Private key management: Implement and maintain a secure private key management solution to prevent key leakage and unauthorized access
● Signature algorithm implementation: Implement and optimize cryptographic signature algorithms to ensure the authenticity and integrity of transactions
● Transaction security: Develop and maintain cryptocurrency recharge/aggregate/withdrawal functions to ensure the security of the transaction process and prevent various security threats
● Troubleshooting and fixing: Monitor the system’s operational status, promptly address and fix any technical issues that may arise
● Documentation writing: Write and maintain relevant technical documentation to ensure team members can accurately understand and use the system.


## Requirements
● Educational background: Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields
● Experience working in exchanges is preferred
● Proficient in the design and implementation of HD wallets, hot wallets, and multi-chain wallets
● Experience in secure development of cryptocurrency recharge/aggregate/withdrawal
● Understanding of basic networking knowledge, TCP/IP, UDP, HTTP, and other network protocols, Websocket
● Familiarity with various data structures and algorithms, research on cryptography, security protocols, and encryption algorithms

jobs.summary:
### About Zuzalu.City:
We are building an easy-to-use interface that serves as a collective [operation system](https://zuzalu.craft.me/5w531Ph3lt9Sfi) that connects users to decentralised, open-sourced and autonomous applications that are empowered with privacy choices for a community when it comes to coordination, contribution and collaboration.
jobs.raw_body:
### About Zuzalu.City:
We are building an easy-to-use interface that serves as a collective [operation system](https://zuzalu.craft.me/5w531Ph3lt9Sfi) that connects users to decentralised, open-sourced and autonomous applications that are empowered with privacy choices for a community when it comes to coordination, contribution and collaboration.

### About Ethereum Community Fund:
We are an early-stage project currently building the Alpha, with a mission of creating an inclusive destination bwhere users can publish, discover, contribute, share and fund blockchain development projects focusing on Web3 technology. lnformation about projects and interests in projects are focused into a unified, open and user-friendly platform and all information is curated and governed by the platform community.

You will be working with a competent, fun and inclusive team based across different time zones, from different backgrounds and nationalities, dedicated to the development and growth of the community platform and Web3 tech.

### Role: Front-End Developer
**Remote | Full-time**

We are looking for a talented Front-End Engineer to build and maintain cutting-edge Web3 applications that empower users within our ecosystem. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to create highly interactive and seamless user interfaces that align with our product vision and business objectives.

### Responsibilities

- Develop pixel-perfect and UX-optimized Web3 applications using TypeScript and Next.js.
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams to define, prioritize, and implement features that meet both user and business needs.
- Ensure components are functional, intuitive, performant, and mobile-responsive.
- Maintain high-quality code standards, including efficient documentation and testing.

### Requirements

- 2+ years of experience in frontend engineering, with a strong command of TypeScript and React.
- Solid experience working in Web3, with proficiency in Web3 libraries such as ethers.js, wagmi, and viem.
- Experience in building and maintaining production-grade SDKs, APIs, or systems at scale.
- A passion for creating elegant, user-friendly, and performant interfaces that empower users in the Web3 space.

### Personal

- Highly self-motivated/self-driven
- Insatiably hungry to learn and grow
- Fluent in English
- Highly reliable/Ability to meet deadlines ahead of time
- Focus on solutions mentality!
- Comfortable with an adaptive fast-paced startup environment.
- Ability to work in a diverse multi-disciplinary team.
- Sense of humour is a plus!

We understand that not every applicant will know everything. If you think you have what it takes and are willing to learn, send your CV & cover letter to hello@ecf.network!!

- Warpcast: https://warpcast.com/zuzalucity
- Medium: https://medium.com/@Zuzalu_city

We are building an easy-to-use interface that serves as a collective [operation system](https://zuzalu.craft.me/5w531Ph3lt9Sfi) that connects users to decentralised, open-sourced and autonomous applications that are empowered with privacy choices for a community when it comes to coordination, contribution and collaboration.

### About Ethereum Community Fund:
We are an early-stage project currently building the Alpha, with a mission of creating an inclusive destination bwhere users can publish, discover, contribute, share and fund blockchain development projects focusing on Web3 technology. lnformation about projects and interests in projects are focused into a unified, open and user-friendly platform and all information is curated and governed by the platform community.

You will be working with a competent, fun and inclusive team based across different time zones, from different backgrounds and nationalities, dedicated to the development and growth of the community platform and Web3 tech.

### Role: Product Designer
**Remote | Full-time**

Ethereum Community Fund is looking for a solid product designer strong in application design preferably with experience in more complex applications. User experience design experience is a plus. As a designer here at ECF, going with the standard product design templated process and research may not be the apt approach for us as we are involved in several open source projects with many other teams in our space collaborating on a constant basis — It will be necessary to adapt with the flow and time constraints we constantly face.

However, your contributions will not be limited to just design or UX research but as a part of the on-going and deeper discourse amongst many domain experts in privacy, cryptography, decentralized networking, governance, social including many more areas. Everyone can be a part of any discussion and we expect each member to engage anywhere we can to build the best products for the community.

As a product designer we also expect you to have visual capacity for both great design and great UX implementation. Having up-to-date knowledge with best practices and being resourceful. Being transparent with your work and always up to share progress with anyone on the team is also something we value.

### Important Points

- Solid user of Figma (or other equivalent)
- Building components and managing a library of components
- Use of auto-layout and properties
- Providing clear specs with annotations for developers
- Well organized with designs in pages and naming conventions
- Can prototype (e.g. Framer)
- Fast prototyping is a VERY handy tool in our situation as many folks will not have the time to fully understand static designs in a call.
- Figma prototyping is also great.
- Dev Hand-off & Communication
- Being resourceful to find FE solutions with fellow devs
- Clear communication between development both in discussion and in design

### Personal

- Highly self-motivated/self-driven
- Insatiably hungry to learn and grow
- Fluent in English
- Highly reliable/Ability to meet deadlines ahead of time
- Focus on solutions mentality!
- Comfortable with an adaptive fast-paced startup environment.

- Sense of humour is a plus!

jobs.title: [Remote] Babylon is looking for senior software engineer
jobs.summary:
## About Babylon
Babylon is a blockchain project founded by Claude. E. Shannon Award recipient, Professor David Tse from Stanford University. We are proudly backed by leading investors including Polychain, Hack VC, and Framework. The project’s mission is to unlock Bitcoin security for the decentralized world. Our fast-growing team consists of engineers, researchers, and seasoned business experts.
jobs.raw_body:
## About Babylon
Babylon is a blockchain project founded by Claude. E. Shannon Award recipient, Professor David Tse from Stanford University. We are proudly backed by leading investors including Polychain, Hack VC, and Framework. The project’s mission is to unlock Bitcoin security for the decentralized world. Our fast-growing team consists of engineers, researchers, and seasoned business experts. Our team culture is open, inclusive, agile, and passionate, and we highly value everyone’s personal growth.

## Responsibilities
We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to join our team and contribute to one of the most cutting-edge projects in crypto: BitVM Bridge. You will take ownership of the design, development, and maintenance of critical bridge components, including:

BitVM Bridge libraries

Peripheral tools and applications surrounding the bridge

CosmWasm smart contracts on the Babylon chain for bridge-related interactions

Your work will directly impact the interoperability between the Bitcoin chain and the Babylon chain, advancing the state of decentralized security and usability.

## Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent.

Experience:

3+ years of hands-on experience working with Bitcoin, Ethereum, or other major blockchain platforms.

2+ years of systems programming experience, particularly in Rust.

Skills:

Deep understanding of cryptographic primitives and their implementations.

Strong grasp of CI/CD practices and tools to ensure seamless and reliable deployments.

Excellent communication skills, fluent in English, to collaborate effectively in a global team.

## Nice to Haves
Academic research experience or publications in cryptography, blockchain, or related fields.

Hands-on experience with Layer 2 scaling solutions (e.g., Rollups, State Channels).

Hands-on experience with ZKVM / BTC / Taproot / BitVM.

Contributions to open-source blockchain projects.

## Job Nature
We’re searching for a skilled, crypto-native engineer with a deep understanding of Bitcoin, consensus mechanisms, and blockchain security. You should have a proven track record of working with cutting-edge Bitcoin tooling and a strong commitment to following best practices in software development. You are responsible, collaborative, and excited to contribute to groundbreaking advancements in blockchain technology.

- Full-time or not: YES
- Remote or not: YES

## Salary and Benefits
200K +

## Work Location
Remote

## Contact
Gigi
gigi.yip@babylonlabs.io

jobs.raw_body:
## About Babylon
Babylon is a blockchain project founded by Claude. E. Shannon Award recipient, Professor David Tse from Stanford University. We are proudly backed by leading investors including Polychain, Hack VC, and Framework. The project’s mission is to unlock Bitcoin security for the decentralized world. Our fast-growing team consists of engineers, researchers, and seasoned business experts. Our team culture is open, inclusive, agile, and passionate, and we highly value everyone’s personal growth.


## Responsibilities
You will be a senior software engineer contributing to the life cycle of the Babylon system's core components for interacting with the Bitcoin ledger, from design to maintenance. Some examples of core components are the Bitcoin Staking libraries, Babylon node, and the relayers between the Babylon blockchain and Bitcoin.

## Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in CS, electrical engineering, or equivalent

3+ years of experience in blockchain layer-1 development

2+ years of experience working with popular Bitcoin libraries (btcd, lnd, bitcoinlib-js)

1+ years of experience in designing and implementing protocols on top of Bitcoin

Proficient in Golang and Typescript

Solid grasp of CI/CD practices and tools, ensuring smooth and reliable deployments.

Fluent in English, with strong communication skills for effective collaboration in a global team.

## Nice to Haves
Contributions to open-source blockchain projects.

Experience with other blockchain ecosystems, preferably Cosmos.

Experience with BitVM.

## Job Nature

You are an experienced crypto-native software engineer with a deep understanding of Bitcoin and its ecosystem, consensus, and security. You have a proven track record of developing libraries that interact with the state of art Bitcoin tooling. You are passionate and ambitious about blockchain, follow best practices in software development, and have high work standards. You are open, responsible, and willing to help others.



- Full-time or not: YES
- Remote or not: YES

## Salary and Benefits
200K + 

## Work Location
Remote

Gigi

jobs.summary:
必须要有不低于1年的web3行业经验和自动化测试经验！（资深web3产品用户也算！！DEX产品用户加分！！！）
base上海！项目成熟！项目方直聘！
jobs.raw_body:
必须要有不低于1年的web3行业经验和自动化测试经验！（资深web3产品用户也算！！DEX产品用户加分！！！）
base上海！项目成熟！项目方直聘！


**职责描述：**
1. **设计并实施全面的测试策略**，包括功能测试、性能测试和安全性测试，确保DEX平台在稳定性、可扩展性和安全性方面的高标准。
2. **与开发团队协作**，编写和维护自动化测试脚本，优化测试覆盖率，提升测试流程的效率和准确性。
3. **积极沟通并与跨职能团队紧密合作**，包括开发人员、产品经理、客户支持和合作伙伴，共同开发、测试和交付高质量的产品。
4. **基于业务需求和技术架构设计测试用例**，组织并参与测试用例的评审，确保测试方案符合业务目标和技术标准。
5. **执行功能和非功能测试**，识别潜在问题，确保系统按预期运行并达成预期性能目标。
6. **管理Bug的识别、跟踪和修复过程**，推动问题的及时解决，确保按时交付高质量产品。
7. **设计和开发自动化脚本或引入质量管理工具/平台**，持续优化测试效率和自动化水平，提升团队整体生产力。
8. **紧跟技术前沿**，不断评估和应用最新的测试工具、方法和技术，以提升团队的测试流程、方法及整体效率。
9. **参与产品设计评审和需求分析**，提出有效的测试方案并协助定义测试标准，确保产品设计的可测试性。
10. **评估DEX平台在不同网络和环境下的性能表现**，分析并提出优化建议，提升平台的可扩展性和用户体验。

**任职要求：**
1. 计算机科学、软件工程或相关专业的本科及以上学历。
2. 至少3年以上QA工作经验，2年以上区块链行业、去中心化/中心化交易所（DEX/CEX）测试经验，涵盖后端和前端的手动和自动化测试。
3. 熟练使用自动化测试工具和框架（如Selenium、Jest、Mocha、Cypress等），具备设计、开发、执行自动化测试脚本的能力，并能够实施质量管理工具或平台以提升效率。
4. 扎实的区块链基础知识，包括去中心化、共识机制、链上和链下交互的工作原理，熟悉Web3技术栈和DeFi生态系统。
5. 对主流去中心化交易协议（dydx，Uniswap等）有深入理解，能够针对不同DEX协议设计和执行测试。
6. 具备出色的分析和问题解决能力，能够在快速变化的环境中高效处理复杂问题并提供创新的解决方案。
7. 优秀的团队协作和沟通能力，能够与开发团队、产品经理及其他跨职能团队有效协作，推动项目顺利完成。
8. 具备细致入微的观察力和严谨的逻辑思维，能够确保高质量的交付和测试覆盖率。
9. 中英文可作为工作语言，能够阅读和撰写技术文档，并能进行清晰的技术沟通。

Foresight Ventures 是首个也是唯一一个连接东西方的加密风险投资机构。我们坚持以研究为导向，是加密投资与孵化领域的佼佼者，同时在美国和新加坡均设有办公室。我们的顶级媒体网络涵盖 The Block、Foresight News、BlockTempo 和 Coinness。我们积极投资最具突破性的创新项目，致力于与拥有前瞻视野的项目及顶尖团队携手合作，助力他们取得成功，共同重塑数字金融乃至更广阔领域的未来。

## 公司/团队介绍
Foresight Ventures 是首个也是唯一一个连接东西方的加密风险投资机构。我们坚持以研究为导向，是加密投资与孵化领域的佼佼者，同时在美国和新加坡均设有办公室。我们的顶级媒体网络涵盖 The Block、Foresight News、BlockTempo 和 Coinness。我们积极投资最具突破性的创新项目，致力于与拥有前瞻视野的项目及顶尖团队携手合作，助力他们取得成功，共同重塑数字金融乃至更广阔领域的未来。

### 地点：远程

### 岗位职责：

jobs.summary:

jobs.raw_body:
## 公司/团队介绍
AltLayer 成立于 2021 年，是一个去中心化协议，有助于启动使用 native 和 restake 的形式启动 optimistic 和 zk rollup stack。我们的解决方案在每个级别（sequencing、execution 和 verification）上都增强了链上功能。
基于此协议构建的 AltLayer 还提供无代码汇总即服务 (RaaS) Dashboard，任何人只需单击几下即可在 2 分钟内启动自定义 rollup。RaaS 启动板专为多链和多 VM 世界而设计。它支持不同的汇总 SDK，例如 OP Stack、Arbitrum Orbit、Linea、Polygon zkEVM CDK 和 Starkware 等。
AltLayer 产品得到了以太坊 Arbitrum、Optimism、EigenLayer、Polygon、Polychain Capital、Breyer Capital、Messari、Jump 等顶级行业建设者、风险投资家和研究人员的认可。
基于模块化区块链精神的宗旨，我们梦想建立一个可以让数十万个汇总蓬勃发展的生态系统，为无限的应用和大规模采用打开闸门。

## 薪资福利待遇
 5000-8000（或面议） USD / 月

## 地点

- 工作地点：远程
- 联系方式：hiring@altlayer.io

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：全职
- 是否远程：远程

## 岗位要求、职责
### 职责
1. 负责 RaaS (Rollup as Service) 以及 Avs as Service 的后台业务架构设计，数据库表设计及开发
2. 负责部分 go 的中间件的设计及开发，主要和调度 k8s 相关
3. 探索和研究一些 rollup 技术方案(如 opstack, arbitrum orbit) 的代码实现，结合区块链经验进行业务的设计
### 要求
1. 必要：
    1. 熟悉且擅长 go 语言，有 go 开发过中型及大型后台业务经验或开发过中间件或 lib
    2. 熟悉go中的各类设计模式及最佳实践方案，有扎实的编程功底，良好的设计和代码风格，熟悉 restful 设计规范
    3. 熟悉 go 语言的常用后台开发框架和常用的 rpc 框架 （thrift, protobuf）
    4. 熟悉常用存储技术 （postgre）及数据库schema设计，熟悉常用中间件 (kafka, rabbitmq)
2. 加分 （以下满足一条或多条）
    1. 熟悉 Rust ，Typescript 语言，有用这些语言开发的开源项目的经历
    2. 有区块链开发经验（区块链开发，非区块链应用开发），熟悉区块链的基本架构，理解区块链系统中常见问题
    3. 熟悉分布式系统中常见问题及解决方案，了解分布式共识算法
    4. 熟悉 k8s 的使用，有使用 go 调度 k8s 的经验
   
## 工作环境
AltLayer 一直保持浓厚的工程师文化和 geek 氛围，注重人才的发展，鼓励技术分享，坚持 “小而美”。全员 remote work 多年，看重结果而非形式，为共同创业的小伙伴们创造了一个充满自由、尊重和信任的工作环境。

前序招聘Issue链接 https://github.com/rebase-network/who-is-hiring/issues/550

jobs.summary:

AI Agent领域的Web3公司
jobs.raw_body:
## 公司/团队介绍
AI Agent领域的Web3公司

## 薪资福利待遇
3000-5000u

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是
  
## 岗位信息

负责推动AI Agent相关产品的设计、开发和优化。作为AI产品经理，您将与技术、设计和业务团队密切合作，深入理解用户需求，制定产品策略，并持续推动产品在AI和Crypto领域的创新与落地。

### 岗位职责：
1、AI Agent产品管理：负责AI Agent产品的需求分析、功能设计和产品规划，确保产品满足市场需求并具有竞争力。
深入研究AI Agent的技术和应用场景，探索创新型解决方案。
2、产品生命周期管理管理产品从概念到上线的完整生命周期，包括需求定义、开发进度跟踪、测试和上线后的优化迭代。
持续收集用户反馈，分析数据，优化产品功能和用户体验。
3、行业洞察与创新：跟踪AI技术和Crypto行业的最新趋势，挖掘潜在市场机会，将前沿技术融入产品设计中。
与行业伙伴和社区建立联系，推动产品在Crypto生态中的应用和影响力。
4、跨团队协作：与技术团队紧密合作，确保产品开发符合设计和功能预期。与市场、运营团队协作，制定产品推广策略，实现业务目标。

### 任职要求：
1、经验要求至少1年以上AI Agent相关产品经验，了解AI Agent的核心技术和应用场景。对Crypto行业有深入的理解，包括但不限于区块链技术、DeFi、NFT等领域。
2、技能要求：熟悉AI产品的开发流程和技术实现，能够与技术团队高效沟通。具备数据分析能力，能够通过数据驱动产品决策。优秀的产品设计能力，能够将用户需求转化为具体的产品功能。
3、其他要求：本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能、区块链等相关专业优先。具备优秀的沟通能力、团队协作能力和项目管理能力。对AI和Crypto领域充满热情，乐于接受挑战并推动创新。

### 其他
具有竞争力的薪酬和激励机制（给token）。与行业顶尖团队合作的机会，参与前沿技术的产品落地。

jobs.responsibilities: 数据库管理与维护 负责开发和测试环境下数据库的安装、配置、升级、迁移及日常维护。 监控数据库性能，优化数据库架构，确保开发和测试环境数据库的高效运行。 负责数据库备份与恢复，制定并执行相关备份策略，确保数据库安全。 数据库性能优化 诊断和解决数据库的性能瓶颈，优化SQL查询语句、索引和存储过程。 分析数据库日志，预防并处理可能影响数据库性能的隐患，确保开发与测试环境下交易系统的高效运行。 开发与测试支持 与开发和测试团队紧密合作，支持其对数据库的需求，帮助创建并维护开发和测试数据库。 为开发和测试提供数据复制、环境搭建以及数据库问题排查支持。 提供数据库表设计建议，确保表结构适应业务需求，数据访问高效。 数据库安全管理 负责数据库的权限管理，确保开发与测试环境下数据库的安全性和数据隐私保护。 定期检查并修复数据库漏洞，防范潜在的安全风险。 自动化工具与脚本 编写并维护数据库管理的自动化脚本，减少手动操作并提升工作效率。 开发数据库健康检查的自动化监控工具，确保数据库的实时监控和问题早期发现。 文档编写 制定并更新开发和测试环境下的数据库管理文档，确保团队对数据库的操作规范统一。 记录数据库变更历史、性能优化记录及解决的数据库问题，确保知识传递。

jobs.raw_body:
## 公司/团队介绍
CoinW币赢成为了全球领先的综合性加密资产交易平台，为全球2.2亿数字货币用户提供一站式数字资产服务入口。 CoinW币赢成立以来一直秉承“赋能区块链科技金融变革”和“帮助用户财富增值”的服务宗旨，不断优化自身产品线，创新突破，引领加密资产行业新趋势。

## 薪资福利待遇30-45K
开发者喜欢薪资范围准确的招聘信息。
此项必须填写，否则 Rebase 公众号和其它媒体渠道可能不会转发。

## 地点

- 工作地点：远程办公
- 联系方式：微信13540602252或者tg：@Siri0089

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：全职
- 是否远程：远程
- 时区要求：中国北京时间9点30-18点30
  
## 岗位要求、职责

岗位概述： 
负责管理、维护和优化数字货币交易系统开发与测试环境中的数据库，确保数据库的稳定性、可靠性和性能。同时支持开发和测试团队的数据库需求，优化SQL查询，参与数据库架构设计，提供数据库相关的技术支持，确保交易系统的开发与测试过程顺利进行。 
 
岗位职责： 
数据库管理与维护 
负责开发和测试环境下数据库的安装、配置、升级、迁移及日常维护。 
监控数据库性能，优化数据库架构，确保开发和测试环境数据库的高效运行。 
负责数据库备份与恢复，制定并执行相关备份策略，确保数据库安全。 
数据库性能优化 
诊断和解决数据库的性能瓶颈，优化SQL查询语句、索引和存储过程。 
分析数据库日志，预防并处理可能影响数据库性能的隐患，确保开发与测试环境下交易系统的高效运行。 
开发与测试支持 
与开发和测试团队紧密合作，支持其对数据库的需求，帮助创建并维护开发和测试数据库。 
为开发和测试提供数据复制、环境搭建以及数据库问题排查支持。 
提供数据库表设计建议，确保表结构适应业务需求，数据访问高效。 
数据库安全管理 
负责数据库的权限管理，确保开发与测试环境下数据库的安全性和数据隐私保护。 
定期检查并修复数据库漏洞，防范潜在的安全风险。 
自动化工具与脚本 
编写并维护数据库管理的自动化脚本，减少手动操作并提升工作效率。 
开发数据库健康检查的自动化监控工具，确保数据库的实时监控和问题早期发现。 
文档编写 
制定并更新开发和测试环境下的数据库管理文档，确保团队对数据库的操作规范统一。 
记录数据库变更历史、性能优化记录及解决的数据库问题，确保知识传递。 
任职要求： 
学历背景： 
 
计算机科学、信息技术或相关专业的学士学位，具有相关专业资格认证者优先。 
工作经验： 
至少3年以上数据库管理经验，、金融系统或高频交易平台的数据库管理经验者优先。 
熟悉MySQL、PostgreSQL、MongoDB等主流数据库的管理、配置和优化工作。 
技能要求： 
熟悉开发和测试环境下数据库的部署、管理和优化，有较强的SQL优化经验。 
熟悉Linux操作系统环境下的数据库管理及相关自动化工具的使用。 
熟练掌握数据库备份、恢复、安全管理等操作。 
具有数据库性能监控和调优的经验，能够快速识别并解决数据库瓶颈问题。 
其他要求： 
具备较强的沟通能力和团队协作能力，能够与开发、测试团队紧密合作，提供数据库支持。 
具备问题分析和解决能力，能够应对复杂的数据库问题，确保开发与测试环境的稳定运行。 
具备较强的文档编写能力，能够规范数据库管理流程。

## 公司/团队介绍
头部币所web3团队 同步招聘 APP开发 前端 后端 测试

## 薪资福利待遇
薪资open 不卡涨幅

- 联系方式：VX：ljlljl269 Email：baron.lee@interwinee.com
## 工作性质
中文
    职位名称：
-区块链工程师
工作地点：
- 远程 / 马来西亚 / 阿布扎比
职位类型：
- 全职
职位描述：
        我们正在寻找多位经验丰富的区块链技术工程师，负责开发和维护区块链平台。候选人需深入理解多种区块链技术，能够进行合约解析和链解析，推动web3项目的实现与发展。

基本要求：
- 精通两种以上开发语言，如 Java、TypeScript、Solidity、Rust 等。
- 熟悉至少两条区块链（如 EVM、比特币、Ton、Solana、Sui）的工作原理、共识算法、区块、交易及账号结构或模型。
- 具备较强的链解析能力，能够理解和分析区块链结构、数据及协议，实现高效的区块和交易解析。
- 具备扎实的合约解析能力，精通合约结构、事件和方法，支持常见 DeFi 协议的解析。
- 熟悉跨链及二层（L2）工作原理。
- 熟悉不同类型的钱包开发，包括助记词、MPC 和 AA 钱包等。
- 熟悉相关区块链的智能合约编写、测试、分析和优化，了解合约的常见攻防手法。
- 熟悉主流的区块链共识机制，如 PoW、PoS、PoH、BFT 等。
- 熟悉常见的 DeFi 协议，具备分析其源码和整合经验（如 Uniswap、MakerDAO、Aave、1Inch 等）。
- 拥有实际的区块链开发经验，能够独立完成项目设计与实施，包括需求分析、架构设计、编码和测试。
- 具备良好的编码习惯，能够编写高质量的代码和文档，熟悉版本控制工具（如 Git）。
- 具备良好的团队合作与沟通能力，能与团队成员有效沟通，快速学习新技术并分享知识。

加分项：
- 有参与开源区块链项目的经验，并能展示自己的贡献。
- 熟悉区块链安全性及最佳实践，能够识别和修复潜在的安全漏洞。
- 了解 DeFi、NFT 等区块链领域的最新动态和技术趋势，能提出创新的解决方案。
- 具备良好的英语听说读写能力，能够阅读技术文档并参与国际社区讨论。

- 监控和分析平台性能，快速响应并解决系统故障、网络问题及其他技术问题。
- 协调并推动与开发、产品、技术支持等部门的合作，确保平台的稳定运行。
- 制定灾难恢复计划，并定期进行演练，确保系统故障时能够迅速恢复服务。

- 协助产品团队进行系统功能更新，优化运维支持，提升用户体验。

3. 自动化工具开发与实施：
- 推动自动化运维工具的开发与实施，减少手动操作，提高工作效率。
- 与研发团队合作，推动CI/CD流程，提升持续集成和部署的自动化水平。

4. 故障应急与问题管理：
- 快速响应和处理突发的技术故障，协调各方进行故障排查和解决，确保快速恢复服务。
- 通过事后复盘，持续优化应急处理流程和运维体系，减少未来故障发生。

- 定期向管理层汇报运维状态、关键KPI指标和服务可用性，提出改进建议。

2. 工作经验：
- 至少 1 年以上大型互联网/区块链平台的运维经验，具有大型交易所或金融平台运维经验者优先。
-  熟悉云计算、大数据、容器化技术（Docker、Kubernetes等）及微服务架构。
- 熟练掌握Linux操作系统，具有丰富的故障诊断与排除经验。
- 有自动化运维经验，熟悉常见的自动化运维工具（如Ansible、SaltStack等）。

2. 技术能力：

- 熟悉网络协议、数据库和高可用架构，有搭建分布式系统、负载均衡等相关经验。
- 有监控系统经验，熟悉Prometheus、Zabbix、Grafana等工具。

3. 沟通与抗压能力：
- 强烈的责任心和风险意识，能够承受一定的工作压力。
- 良好的沟通技巧，能够清晰地表达技术问题和解决方案。

- 有安全运维经验，能够处理DDoS、渗透测试等安全事件者优先。

jobs.raw_body:
## 公司/团队介绍
公司Luminarytech，我们是一家专门从事软件开发和视频制作的科技公司，提供定制解决方案，包括定制软件、移动应用程序和网络平台，以及企业和营销视频。我们的使命是通过创新和效率推动业务增长，为各行各业的中小企业和大型企业客户提供服务，此次职缺是公司新部门的游戏项目。

## 薪资福利待遇
薪资10-15k

## 地点

- 工作地点：居家办公
- 联系方式：telegram：@yuyizhi99 email：yeyule240823@gmail.com

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是
- 时区要求：周一至周五11-23 含午休，周六11-19 含午休，周日休息，同步国内法定节假日
  
## 岗位要求、职责
工作职责：
协助主数值策划完成核心数值框架的设计与优化：
在主策划的指导下，进行游戏数值模型的搭建与平衡性调整。
协助进行数值体系的梳理，包括角色成长、装备属性、技能倍率、经济系统等内容。
数值表格的制作与维护：
根据主策划提供的需求，负责制作和维护游戏数值表格，确保数据准确性和逻辑性。
实时更新和优化数值配置，确保与游戏整体玩法相匹配。
游戏数据分析与反馈：
配合团队进行游戏数据的统计和分析，发现数值方面的异常或优化点。
根据用户反馈和数据表现，提出数值调整建议。
文档编写与沟通支持：
协助编写和整理数值设计文档，确保团队成员清晰理解数值逻辑。
与开发、测试、美术等团队沟通，确保数值设计准确落地。
数值模拟与验证：
使用工具或代码进行数值模拟，验证游戏内的数值设计是否合理。
发现可能存在的数值问题并提出改进方案。
任职要求：
对游戏数值策划有深刻的兴趣，了解游戏数值设计的基本原理；
熟练使用Excel等数据分析工具，掌握基础公式和统计功能，有Python、Lua等脚本语言能力者优先；
对数学和逻辑思维能力有较强的掌握，能够理解并设计复杂的数值系统；
热爱游戏，具备良好的游戏体验和理解能力，对不同类型游戏的数值设计有一定的了解；
具有较强的沟通协调能力和团队合作精神，能够有效理解主策划的需求并执行；
学习能力强，能快速掌握新工具、新方法，适应工作中的需求变化；
有相关项目经验或数值策划实习经验者优先。
加分项：
参与过游戏相关项目，熟悉项目开发流程；
对市场主流游戏的数值体系有研究并能提出见解；
能够用数据驱动设计，善于从数据中发现问题并解决。

## 工作环境
居家远端办公

jobs.title: [Remote] Cryptape is looking for Blockchain/Rust Engineer (Nervos CKB)
jobs.summary: ## About Cryptape
jobs.raw_body:
## About Cryptape

Cryptape is a leading company dedicated to advancing blockchain technology, focused on the development of the Nervos CKB and key technologies within its ecosystem. We firmly believe in the power of decentralization and drive global blockchain industry growth through continuous technological innovation. We are looking for passionate individuals eager to grow in blockchain technology to join our core team and explore the challenges within the Nervos CKB ecosystem.

- Website: https://www.cryptape.com/
- Code: https://github.com/nervosnetwork/ckb
- Blog: https://blog.cryptape.com/

## Job Description

As a Software Engineer on the CKB Core Team, you'll be at the forefront of driving innovation within the Nervos CKB ecosystem. This role presents an exciting opportunity to contribute to the design and implementation of cutting-edge features, ensuring the performance, scalability, and security of the core Nervos CKB. You'll have the chance to explore novel solutions that push the boundaries of blockchain technology, shaping the future evolution of the entire Nervos CKB ecosystem. We're seeking a talented and driven engineer who is passionate about making an impact in the world of blockchain technology. To get a better sense of what we're doing, check out the [Nervos CKB GitHub repository](https://github.com/nervosnetwork)

## Responsibilities

- Collaborate with the team to design and implement new features in the core Nervos CKB.
- Identify and troubleshoot performance issues to optimize the performance of Nervos CKB.
- Contribute to the development and improvement of the CKB Layer1 project, ensuring its efficiency and effectiveness.
- Explore emerging technologies and research areas to enhance the capabilities of the Nervos CKB ecosystem.

## Requirements

- Bachelor's degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field.
- Proficiency in at least one system programming language (Rust, C++, etc. preferred)
- Previous involvement in open-source projects, demonstrating a commitment to collaborative development.
- Experience with projects involving handwritten assembly languages, providing insights into low-level optimization techniques.
- Good reading comprehension of English technical documents.
- Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate with team members to solve problems.
- High self-motivation and learning ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

## Nice to Haves

- Knowledge of cryptography and security protocols relevant to blockchain technology, enhancing the security of the Nervos CKB ecosystem.
- Experience in lower-level computer systems, computer architecture, or embedded systems, contributing to the optimization of Nervos CKB performance.
- Strong background in operating systems and compilers, with proficient use of Linux.
- Previous experience as a maintainer of open-source libraries in esoteric languages, showcasing a diverse skill set and commitment to community-driven development.

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: Remote

## Salary and Benefits
4000-7500 USD/m

## Work Location
Worldwide Remote

## Contact
Join@cryptape.com

## 公司/团队介绍
https://rns.id/

## 薪资福利待遇
80-200元/时

## 地点

- 工作地点：远程
- 联系方式：https://t.me/Jane20241111 或 [jane@tulingc.com](mailto:jane@tulingc.com)

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：兼职
- 是否远程：远程
- 时区要求：GMT+8优先，可覆盖核心工作时间，可适应国际分布式团队协作
  
## 岗位要求、职责
岗位职责
1. 产品规划与管理：
  - 深入了解公司业务需求及痛点，制定客户管理系统的长期优化规划。
  - 设计和实施覆盖客户全生命周期的系统模块，包括客户获取、销售管理、服务支持、续约与流失预警等关键功能。
  - 优化客户管理系统中的复杂逻辑，如多角色权限、多层级数据共享及多场景业务支持。
2. 需求分析与落地：
  - 与业务团队深入合作，梳理和分析客户管理流程中的关键节点及挑战。
  - 转化业务需求为清晰、可执行的产品需求文档（PRD），包括系统逻辑、数据流转和接口设计等。
  - 推动系统对接第三方工具（如BI分析、邮件营销等），提升系统的功能扩展性与灵活性。
3. 跨团队协作与项目管理：
  - 协调研发、设计、运营和业务团队，确保产品需求被准确理解并高质量落地。
  - 负责项目全生命周期管理，保障产品迭代按计划交付。
  - 组织上线培训，推动业务团队快速上手并提升系统使用效率。
4. 持续优化与创新：
  - 持续监控客户管理系统的使用反馈和业务成效，制定迭代优化方案。
  - 关注行业趋势，并在客户管理领域引入适当的新兴技术提升系统效率。
任职要求
1. 专业背景与经验：
  - 5年以上产品经理经验，深入参与过企业级CRM或客户管理类系统的设计、开发与优化。
  - 丰富的复杂业务场景经验，能梳理和优化多角色、多层级权限、跨模块数据共享等逻辑。
  - 有成功案例，能够清晰阐述如何通过产品提升业务效率或客户管理效果。
2. 技术能力：

  - 具备优秀的逻辑思维与复杂业务梳理能力，能够在多变的业务需求中抓住核心问题并给出解决方案。
  - 强大的项目管理与跨部门沟通能力，能高效协调团队实现产品目标。
  - 学习能力强，对新兴技术保持兴趣，对Web3等新兴趋势有了解或兴趣者优先。
4. 语言能力：

  - 英文能力佳者优先（用于阅读技术文档或跨国合作）。

## 岗位要求、职责
职位描述
我们正在寻找一位经验丰富的产品经理，专注于支付网关类产品的设计与优化。该职位要求候选人对支付场景有深刻理解，具备处理复杂业务逻辑的能力，同时对Web3领域保持学习热情，探索去中心化支付的未来应用。
岗位职责
1. 产品规划与管理：
  - 调研支付网关的市场需求及行业趋势，制定差异化产品策略和路线图。
  - 设计和优化支付网关的核心功能，如支付流程、对账管理、退款流程等。
2. 需求分析与落地：
  - 处理复杂的支付场景需求，包括跨境支付、多币种支持、分账规则等。
  - 梳理并定义支付网关系统的业务逻辑，撰写高质量的PRD。
3. 跨团队协作：
  - 与开发、设计、法务等团队紧密合作，确保产品按时高质量上线。
  - 协调商户、支付服务提供商（PSP）和银行等外部合作伙伴的对接需求。
4. 技术探索与创新：
  - 关注Web3在支付场景中的应用潜力，如数字钱包、智能合约支付。
  - 推动新兴技术在支付网关中的落地应用，提升系统效率和用户体验。
任职要求
1. 专业背景与经验：
  - 5年以上支付网关或支付系统产品经理经验，熟悉支付生态（包括支付服务商、网关集成等）。
  - 精通支付流程中的复杂逻辑，如分账、多方对账、跨平台结算等。
2. 技术能力：
  - 熟悉支付网关技术架构，了解主流支付协议及接口设计（如RESTful API）。
  - 对Web3技术（如去中心化支付、稳定币结算）有基本了解或应用经验。
3. 技能与素质：
  - 出色的逻辑梳理和需求分析能力，能够解决复杂支付场景中的业务问题。
  - 较强的项目管理能力，能在跨部门及多方协作中推动项目落地。
加分项
- 有Web3支付场景（如加密货币支付、区块链结算）经验。

jobs.title: [上海/远程] Mask Network 诚聘后端工程师
jobs.summary: ## 🎉关于 Mask Network
jobs.raw_body:
## 🎉关于 Mask Network

- Mask Network 作为 Web3 的社交龙头，帮助用户在 Twitter，Facebook 等传统社交网络上使用 Web2 无法实现的 Web3 好用功能，并保护数据产权和隐私，一个尊重隐私，加密数据，保护资产的新大陆！

- Web3 的浪潮正在袭来！我们欢迎任何尊重个人自我主权和数据隐私权益的人来 Mask Network 创造并尝试新的应用，并且通过 Mask Network 建立的这个平台，更便利更快捷地触及到数十亿的社交媒体用户。

- 欢迎热爱 Web3，有热情有了解的你来加入我们！

## 🤩福利待遇

- Anti 996

- 只在工作日进行团建活动

- 无限量饮料、零食，不定期投放下午茶歇

- 上海超大办公室，全球分布式办公，不打卡更自由


## 💻工作内容

1. 参与产品设计和技术架构讨论，提供技术建议和支持；
2. 与前端开发人员、产品经理和设计师合作，确保产品的用户体验和技术要求得到满足；
3. 优化后端性能和稳定性，确保系统高可用性；
4. 跟进 Web3 技术发展，及时更新和优化技术栈，保证产品技术领先性。


## 📋任职要求

1. 有3年以上的后端开发经验，熟练掌握至少一种主流编程语言（如JavaScript、Python、Go等）；
2. 熟悉 Web3 技术栈，有以太坊智能合约、DApp 开发经验；
3. 熟悉分布式系统和数据库设计，有大规模高并发系统设计和开发经验；
4. 熟练使用各种数据库，如 MySQL、PostgreSQL、MongoDB 等；
5. 熟悉 Web 服务和 RESTful API 设计；
6. 熟悉至少一种云计算平台，如 AWS、Azure、Google Cloud 等；
7. 具有良好的沟通和团队协作能力，能够与跨部门的团队紧密合作。


## 👍加分项

1. 有丰富的链上交互经历，熟悉以太坊生态技术
2. 对容器化，微服务等概念有所了解，熟悉公有云组件与服务，有 AWS 开发经验者优先
3. 有爬虫开发经验
4. 有创业公司或社交产品后端开发经验。



## 📧联系方式
### 邮箱：HR@mask.io

1、3年以上数字资产交易或金融/金融科技产品经理工作经验，5年以上产品经理工作经验。
2、熟悉数字资产各种场内交易产品的业务模型和核心机制。
3、熟悉基金、理财等各种理财产品的业务模型和核心机制。
4、有独立负责产品设计、迭代的项目经验，能够独立编写完整的产品需求文档。
5、具备高级产品经理应该具备的职业能力。

5、协助产品测试，完成产品功能测试。

jobs.title: 🌟 Join the Roosh Tech Team as a Crypto Researcher! 🌟
jobs.summary: Are you passionate about Web3 and Crypto? Roosh Tech is seeking part-time Crypto Researchers to join our dynamic team and explore the most exciting opportunities in the blockchain space.
jobs.raw_body:
Are you passionate about Web3 and Crypto? Roosh Tech is seeking part-time Crypto Researchers to join our dynamic team and explore the most exciting opportunities in the blockchain space.

💻 About Us:
At Roosh Tech, we focus on identifying and supporting early-stage Web3 projects. With a collaborative team of founders, engineers, and investors, we analyze market trends, share insights, and contribute to the future of blockchain innovation. Visit our website to learn more: [roosh.tech/en](https://roosh.tech/en).

💰 Salary and Benefits:
Earn $900 - $1500 per week (flexible, part-time role).

📍 Location:
Remote work available.

🌵 Job Requirements:
1️⃣ A strong curiosity about the crypto and Web3 ecosystem, with a passion for exploring and learning.
2️⃣ Understanding of blockchain trends, DAOs, and industry hot spots; ability to source first-hand information from diverse communities.
3️⃣ Excellent analytical and writing skills, with the ability to craft detailed reports and summaries.
4️⃣ Experience in crypto research, data analysis, or market tracking is a plus.
5️⃣ Proficiency in English for reviewing and translating materials from English resources.

🌟 Why Join Us?

Be part of a forward-thinking team exploring groundbreaking Web3 projects.
Flexible work hours, allowing you to contribute while balancing other commitments.
Opportunities to collaborate with top-tier investors and developers.
📩 How to Apply:
Contact us via Telegram: https://t.me/Roosh_Dmitrenko

Take the next step in your crypto journey and make an impact in the future of Web3 with Roosh Tech! 🚀
